name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Canned - Fish Chunks inGravy 0.4Kg
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Full-balanced, fish protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Bonnie Fish Adult Cat Canned Food , fully balanced, fish protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 6.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 3.5 Crude Fiber (%) -0.3 Moisture (%) -80 Crude Ash (%) - 2 Vitamin A (Min) -1650 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 210 IE/kg Iron - 9.6 mg/kg Copper -1.4 mg/kg Iodine -0.24 mg/kg Manganese -1.8 mg/kg Zinc - 9.5 mg/kg Selenium -0.025 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and Animal Derivatives, Fish and Fish Derivatives (Fish 4%), Cereals, Minerals, Vegetal Protein Extracts, Cassia Gum (2200 mg/kg), Preservatives and Colourants. MINERALS: Iron, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium VITAMINS: Vit A,Vit D3
